summary: Tested BVE data isolation fix (P0) and new forum merge/duplicate safeguard features. All 15 backend tests PASSED. UI verification confirmed BVE mode shows 'Entered Beta Virtual Environment' indicator, Trade History loads from BVE collections, Reset buttons visible. Forum features verified: sidebar with Post Info/Contributors/Awards, merge button for admins, duplicate post safeguard with similar posts warning.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test posts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: BVE data isolation verified - /api/bve/trade/history returns BVE data only, /api/bve/trade/{id} deletes from BVE only. Forum merge at /api/forum/posts/merge requires master_admin or super_admin. Duplicate safeguard uses /api/forum/search-similar-full with has_similar flag. Post details sidebar uses /api/forum/posts/{id}/details.

bve_trade_history_isolation.test: Returns trade history from bve_trade_logs collection only
bve_trade_history_isolation.ui_verification: Trade Monitor shows 63 trades in BVE mode, distinct LOT size (59.26)

bve_trade_delete_isolation.test: Deletes from bve_trade_logs only, never production

bve_rewind_isolation.test: Rewinds BVE state without touching production trade_logs

forum_merge_posts.test: Merges source post into target, moves comments, awards 8pts to source OP
forum_merge_posts.role_check: Only master_admin and super_admin can merge (403 for others)

forum_search_similar_full.test: Searches both title and content, returns has_similar flag
forum_search_similar_full.ui_verification: New Post dialog shows 'Similar posts found' warning

forum_post_details.test: Returns contributors, awards, validation info for sidebar
forum_post_details.ui_verification: Sidebar shows POST INFO section with views, comments, date

forum_merge_button_visibility.result: PASS - Merge icon visible in post header

forum_duplicate_safeguard_ui.test: Shows similar posts warning before submission
elements_verified: Similar existing posts dropdown while typing
Yellow warning: 'Similar posts found — your question may already be answered!'
Continue posting button: 'My question is different — continue posting'

forum_sidebar_ui.test: Post details sidebar visible on post page

ui_verification_screenshots.forum_list: Shows Community Forum with posts, Top Contributors, category filters
ui_verification_screenshots.forum_post_detail: Shows post with sidebar containing POST INFO section
ui_verification_screenshots.new_post_dialog: Dialog with Title, Content, Category, Tags, Image upload
ui_verification_screenshots.similar_posts_suggestions: Dropdown showing similar existing posts while typing
ui_verification_screenshots.trade_monitor_bve: Shows 'Entered Beta Virtual Environment' notification, different LOT size

bve_reset_to_entry_point.fix_verified: Trade history and delete operations in BVE mode only touch bve_* collections
code_locations: /app/frontend/src/pages/TradeMonitorPage.jsx - loadTradeHistory routes to BVE in BVE mode
bve_reset_to_entry_point.result: FIXED - BVE operations isolated from production data
